mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox (event_id, tenant_id, topic, schema_version, aggregate_id, payload, trace_id, occurred_at, created_at, published) VALUES (#{rec.eventId}, #{rec.tenantId}, #{rec.topic}, #{rec.schemaVersion}, #{rec.aggregateId}, #{rec.payloadJson}::jsonb, #{rec.traceId}, #{rec.occurredAt}, #{rec.createdAt}, #{rec.published})
mapper.select: SELECT event_id, tenant_id, topic, schema_version, aggregate_id, payload::text AS payload, trace_id, occurred_at, created_at, published FROM outbox WHERE published = FALSE ORDER BY created_at LIMIT #{batchSize} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
